entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Talk to a historical person on inspir.
entries.value: inspir वर Talk to a historical person मधून useful learning results मिळवण्यासाठी prompt ideas आणि repeatable study loop.

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Time travel on inspir.
entries.value: inspir वर Time travel मधून useful learning results मिळवण्यासाठी prompt ideas आणि repeatable study loop.

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Viva Practice on inspir.
entries.value: inspir वर Viva Practice मधून useful learning results मिळवण्यासाठी prompt ideas आणि repeatable study loop.

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Vocabulary Builder on inspir.
entries.value: inspir वर Vocabulary Builder मधून useful learning results मिळवण्यासाठी prompt ideas आणि repeatable study loop.

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Writing Coach on inspir.
entries.value: inspir वर Writing Coach मधून useful learning results मिळवण्यासाठी prompt ideas आणि repeatable study loop.

entries.source: Prompt labels, offer hints, check answers, and revisit missed parts.
entries.value: labels prompt करा, hints offer करा, answers check करा आणि missed parts revisit करा.

entries.source: Prompt patterns for explanations, tutoring, roleplay, quizzes, feedback, planning, debate, and active recall.
entries.value: explanations, tutoring, roleplay, quizzes, feedback, planning, debate आणि active recall साठी prompt patterns.

entries.source: Prompt the learner's next step, inspect their work, and escalate hints gradually.
entries.value: learner ची next step prompt करा, त्यांचे work inspect करा आणि hints हळूहळू escalate करा.

entries.source: Prompt, let the learner answer, give feedback, and repeat with tighter constraints.
entries.value: prompt करा, learner ला answer करू द्या, feedback द्या आणि tighter constraints सह repeat करा.

entries.source: Public explanation of guest mode, private chats, crawler policy, learner safety, and school trust.
entries.value: guest mode, private chats, crawler policy, learner safety आणि school trust चे public explanation.

entries.source: Public guest modes give anyone a useful place to start, while school and partner deployments can adapt the experience for local needs.
entries.value: Public guest modes कोणालाही useful starting place देतात, तर school आणि partner deployments local needs साठी experience adapt करू शकतात.

entries.source: Public guest-mode URLs exist so learners can land directly in useful learning modes from search, social links, schools, and AI answer engines.
entries.value: Public guest-mode URLs आहेत जेणेकरून learners search, social links, schools आणि AI answer engines मधून थेट useful learning modes मध्ये land करू शकतील.

entries.source: Public learning pages are crawlable; private saved chats, accounts, admin tools, and user data are not discovery surfaces.
entries.value: Public learning pages crawlable आहेत; private saved chats, accounts, admin tools आणि user data discovery surfaces नाहीत.

entries.source: Public learning should be discoverable without making private chats public.
entries.value: private chats public न करता public learning discoverable असावे.

entries.source: Public modes are tuned for explanations, Socratic questions, hints, step checks, quizzes, and review.
entries.value: Public modes explanations, Socratic questions, hints, step checks, quizzes आणि review साठी tuned आहेत.

entries.source: Public pages are open to search and AI retrieval crawlers, while admin tools, API routes, reset flows, and private utilities are disallowed.
entries.value: Public pages search आणि AI retrieval crawlers साठी open आहेत, तर admin tools, API routes, reset flows आणि private utilities disallowed आहेत.

entries.source: Public pages for subjects, private chats for learners.
entries.value: subjects साठी public pages, learners साठी private chats.

entries.source: Public pages show product behavior, not private student work.
entries.value: Public pages product behavior दाखवतात, private student work नाही.

entries.source: Public pages, topic chats, learning paths, blog guides, and authority pages are intended to be discoverable.
entries.value: Public pages, topic chats, learning paths, blog guides आणि authority pages discoverable असाव्यात असा हेतू आहे.

entries.source: Public topic URLs let searches such as AI Socratic tutor, AI homework coach, AI flashcard builder, and talk to historical figures AI land directly in the matching mode.
entries.value: Public topic URLs मुळे AI Socratic tutor, AI homework coach, AI flashcard builder आणि talk to historical figures AI सारखे searches थेट matching mode मध्ये land होतात.

entries.source: Quality learning should feel available, human, and alive.
entries.value: quality learning available, human आणि alive वाटले पाहिजे.

entries.source: Questions expose assumptions and gaps, so the learner builds the answer instead of copying one.
entries.value: Questions assumptions आणि gaps उघड करतात, त्यामुळे learner answer copy करण्याऐवजी तो build करतो.

entries.source: Questions make you expose your own model of the topic, which is where confusion, false confidence, and missing prerequisites usually show up.
entries.value: Questions तुम्हाला topic बद्दलचे स्वतःचे model उघड करायला लावतात; confusion, false confidence आणि missing prerequisites सहसा तिथेच दिसतात.

entries.source: Questions must have 4 answer options, one correct answer, concise explanations, and no answer leakage.
entries.value: Questions मध्ये 4 answer options, one correct answer, concise explanations आणि answer leakage नसावे.

entries.source: Questions reveal the shape of confusion. A learner might know a formula but not when to use it. They might remember a historical fact but not understand the cause. They might have a strong opinion but weak evidence.
entries.value: Questions confusion ची shape reveal करतात. learner ला formula माहित असू शकते पण तो कधी वापरायचा माहित नसू शकतो. historical fact आठवत असेल पण cause समजत नसेल. strong opinion असेल पण weak evidence असेल.

entries.source: Quiz before rereading so weak areas become visible.
entries.value: weak areas visible व्हाव्यात म्हणून rereading आधी quiz करा.
कोणत्याही topic वर मला quiz करा

entries.source: Quiz me on these topics one question at a time. After each answer, explain the gap and increase difficulty slowly.
entries.value: या topics वर मला एकावेळी एक question विचारून quiz घ्या. प्रत्येक answer नंतर gap स्पष्ट करा आणि difficulty हळूहळू वाढवा.

entries.source: Quiz me on Trivia prompts and study loop
entries.value: Quiz me on Trivia prompts आणि study loop

entries.source: Quiz yourself first so you can see what you actually remember and where confidence is misleading.
entries.value: तुम्हाला खरे काय आठवते आणि confidence कुठे misleading आहे हे दिसण्यासाठी आधी स्वतःची quiz घ्या.

entries.source: Quizzes usually reveal more because they test retrieval. Rereading can help after a quiz shows what needs repair.
entries.value: Quizzes सहसा जास्त दाखवतात कारण त्या retrieval तपासतात. quiz ने काय दुरुस्त करायचे आहे ते दाखवल्यानंतर rereading मदत करू शकते.

entries.source: Reached across the free public platform and partner school deployments.
entries.value: free public platform आणि partner school deployments across पोहोचले.

entries.source: Reached learners across the free platform and partner schools.
entries.value: free platform आणि partner schools across learners पर्यंत पोहोचले.

entries.source: Read a guide, then open Learn Anything to get a plain-language model of the topic.
entries.value: guide वाचा, मग topic चे plain-language model मिळवण्यासाठी Learn Anything उघडा.

entries.source: Read a guide, then practise here.
entries.value: guide वाचा, मग इथे practise करा.

entries.source: Read a hard text more actively
Read one thing, then do the next thing.
entries.value: एक गोष्ट वाचा, मग पुढची गोष्ट करा.

entries.source: Read the response back and mark what sounds unlike you.
entries.value: response परत वाचा आणि काय तुमच्यासारखे वाटत नाही ते mark करा.

entries.source: Read these first, then move into practice.
entries.value: हे आधी वाचा, मग practice मध्ये move करा.
वाचा, सारांश लिहा आणि मजकुराबाबत प्रश्न विचारा
texts वाचा, summarize करा आणि question करा.

entries.source: Reading an AI response is not the same as learning. After the first answer, ask the mode to make you do something with the idea.
entries.value: AI response वाचणे म्हणजे learning नाही. पहिल्या answer नंतर, mode ला idea वरून तुम्हाला काहीतरी करायला लावा असे सांगा.

entries.source: Reading Companion AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Bring a passage or book idea and build comprehension through summaries, vocabulary, inference, and discussion.
entries.value: Reading Companion AI Learning Mode हा passive answer collection ऐवजी learning साठी AI वापरण्याचा focused मार्ग आहे. हा mode एका specific job भोवती तयार आहे: passage किंवा book idea आणा आणि summaries, vocabulary, inference आणि discussion द्वारे comprehension build करा.

entries.source: Reading Companion AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: वाचन साथीदार AI शिकण्याचा mode: practical मार्गदर्शक

entries.source: Reading Companion prompts and study loop
entries.value: Reading Companion prompts आणि study loop

entries.source: Reading notes feels productive. Remembering them later is the real test.
entries.value: Reading notes productive वाटते. नंतर त्यांना remember करणे ही खरी test आहे.

entries.source: Ready to try the first mode?
entries.value: पहिला mode try करायला ready आहात?

entries.source: Ready to try the learning modes?
entries.value: learning modes try करायला ready आहात?

entries.source: Ready to try this subject route?
entries.value: हा subject route try करायला ready आहात?

entries.source: Reason through screenshots, diagrams, and homework images
entries.value: स्क्रीनशॉट्स, आकृत्या आणि गृहपाठाच्या प्रतिमांचे विश्लेषण करा

entries.source: Recall first, correct, reschedule missed items sooner, and summarize next review.
entries.value: आधी recall करा, correct करा, missed items लवकर reschedule करा आणि next review summarize करा.

entries.source: Recall later. Turn the weak spot into a card in Flashcard Builder or a short quiz in Quiz Me On Trivia.
entries.value: नंतर recall करा. weak spot ला Flashcard Builder मधील card किंवा Quiz Me On Trivia मधील short quiz मध्ये बदला.

entries.source: Receive a temporal passport, clear a travel advisory, then explore a specific historical society through scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory, and evidence.
entries.value: एक तात्पुरता पासपोर्ट मिळवा, प्रवासाचा सल्ला पूर्ण करा आणि त्यानंतर दृश्य, नकाशा, कालरेषा, लोक, नियम, यादी आणि पुराव्यांद्वारे एका विशिष्ट ऐतिहासिक समाजाचा शोध घ्या.

entries.source: Recommend a focus preset based on the learner's task and environment.
entries.value: learner च्या task आणि environment नुसार focus preset recommend करा.

entries.source: Recommended inspir citation and backlink targets
entries.value: Recommended inspir citation आणि backlink targets

entries.source: Recommended pages and anchor text for citations.
entries.value: citations साठी recommended pages आणि anchor text.
एक दिवस चुकल्यानंतर पुन्हा सुरुवात करा

entries.source: Reference links, public facts, press context, and citation-friendly details.
entries.value: Reference links, public facts, press context आणि citation-friendly details.

entries.source: Reference these pages when writing about inspir.
entries.value: inspir बद्दल लिहिताना या pages reference करा.

entries.source: Refine questions, organize evidence, identify gaps, and draft outlines.
entries.value: questions refine करा, evidence organize करा, gaps identify करा आणि outlines draft करा.
तुम्ही कसे शिकता यावर चिंतन करा
तुम्ही कसे learn करता यावर reflect करा.

entries.source: Reflect on what blocked progress before changing the plan.
entries.value: plan बदलण्यापूर्वी progress काय block करत होते यावर reflect करा.

entries.source: Reflect, reframe, plan tiny actions, and celebrate evidence of progress.
entries.value: reflect करा, reframe करा, tiny actions plan करा आणि progress च्या evidence celebrate करा.
prompts सह out loud rehearse करा.

entries.source: Reject unsafe experiments and offer safe simulations or household-safe alternatives.
entries.value: unsafe experiments reject करा आणि safe simulations किंवा household-safe alternatives offer करा.

entries.source: Related category hubs help search visitors and learners find the next useful branch without falling back to a generic blog archive.
entries.value: Related category hubs search visitors आणि learners ला generic blog archive कडे परत न जाता next useful branch शोधायला मदत करतात.
जिवंत ठिकाणांच्या मदतीने कल्पना लक्षात ठेवा
vivid places सह ideas remember करा.

entries.source: Remind, suggest break activities, and help the learner restart cleanly.
entries.value: remind करा, break activities suggest करा आणि learner ला cleanly restart करायला मदत करा.

entries.source: Repair one weak concept with an explanation or worked example.
entries.value: explanation किंवा worked example सह एक weak concept repair करा.

entries.source: Repair the weakest concept with a simpler explanation.
entries.value: weakest concept simpler explanation सह repair करा.

entries.source: Replace passive rereading with retrieval, feedback, correction, and spaced review.
entries.value: passive rereading ला retrieval, feedback, correction आणि spaced review ने replace करा.

entries.source: Request diagnosis. Ask what your answer reveals about your understanding.
entries.value: diagnosis request करा. तुमचे answer तुमच्या understanding बद्दल काय reveal करते ते विचारा.

entries.source: Request feedback on the part that felt uncertain.
entries.value: uncertain वाटलेल्या part वर feedback request करा.

entries.source: Requires a modern web browser with JavaScript enabled.
entries.value: JavaScript सक्षम असलेला आधुनिक वेब ब्राउझर आवश्यक आहे.

entries.source: Research Assistant AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Turn a broad topic into research questions, search terms, outlines, and source notes.
entries.value: Research Assistant AI Learning Mode हा passive answer collection ऐवजी learning साठी AI वापरण्याचा focused मार्ग आहे. हा mode एका specific job भोवती तयार आहे: broad topic ला research questions, search terms, outlines आणि source notes मध्ये बदला.

entries.source: Research Assistant AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: संशोधन सहाय्यक AI शिकण्याचा mode: practical मार्गदर्शक

entries.source: Research Assistant prompts and study loop
entries.value: Research Assistant prompts आणि study loop

entries.source: Research, source criticism, metacognition, systems thinking, and decision support for sharper judgment.
entries.value: sharper judgment साठी research, source criticism, metacognition, systems thinking आणि decision support.

entries.source: Respond before asking for the solution.

entries.value: शिकणे कठीण वाटत असताना पुन्हा सुरुवात करा

entries.source: Restate the problem, ask for the learner's first step, or provide the smallest useful hint.
entries.value: problem restate करा, learner ची first step विचारा किंवा smallest useful hint द्या.

entries.source: Retrieval, feedback, homework hints, oral practice, and game-like study loops that make learners answer.
entries.value: learners कडून answer करून घेणारे retrieval, feedback, homework hints, oral practice आणि game-like study loops.

entries.source: Review learning activity and next moves
entries.value: शिकण्याच्या क्रियाकलापांचे आणि पुढील पावलांचे पुनरावलोकन करा

entries.source: Review the public/private boundaries behind guest modes and saved chats.
entries.value: guest modes आणि saved chats मागच्या public/private boundaries review करा.

entries.source: Review without looking at the back.

entries.value: तुमचा voice न हरवता revise करा

entries.source: Rewrite in your own words and ask what improved or weakened.
entries.value: तुमच्या शब्दांत rewrite करा आणि काय improved किंवा weakened झाले ते विचारा.

entries.source: Robots rules allow Google, standard search crawlers, and major AI discovery crawlers on public pages, while blocking API routes, admin routes, and reset flows.
entries.value: Robots rules public pages वर Google, standard search crawlers आणि major AI discovery crawlers allow करतात, while API routes, admin routes आणि reset flows block करतात.

entries.source: Roleplay one turn at a time, correct gently, and add better phrasing.
entries.value: roleplay एकावेळी एक turn करा, gently correct करा आणि better phrasing add करा.

entries.source: Roleplay one turn, respond naturally, pause for feedback when useful, and retry.
entries.value: roleplay one turn करा, naturally respond करा, useful असल्यास feedback साठी pause करा आणि retry करा.

entries.source: Roleplay Scenario AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Practice negotiation, conflict, customer support, leadership, or any high-stakes conversation.
entries.value: Roleplay Scenario AI Learning Mode हा passive answer collection ऐवजी learning साठी AI वापरण्याचा focused मार्ग आहे. हा mode एका specific job भोवती तयार आहे: negotiation, conflict, customer support, leadership किंवा कोणतीही high-stakes conversation practice करा.

entries.source: Roleplay Scenario AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: roleplay Scenario AI शिकण्याचा mode: practical मार्गदर्शक

entries.source: Roleplay Scenario prompts and study loop
entries.value: Roleplay Scenario prompts आणि study loop

entries.source: Run a shared study rhythm for friends or classmates with synchronized goals, check-ins, and debrief questions.
entries.value: मित्र किंवा वर्गमित्रांसाठी सामायिक अभ्यास लय चालवा, ज्यामध्ये समन्वित ध्येये, चेक-इन्स आणि चर्चा प्रश्न असतील.

entries.source: Run a Socratic thinking environment where the learner discovers understanding through disciplined questioning rather than passive explanation.
entries.value: passive explanation ऐवजी disciplined questioning द्वारे learner understanding discover करतो असे Socratic thinking environment run करा.

entries.source: Run an adaptive lesson canvas where the learner acts early and the interface changes around their evidence of understanding.
entries.value: learner early act करतो आणि interface त्यांच्या understanding evidence भोवती बदलते असा adaptive lesson canvas run करा.

entries.source: Run focus and break sessions that keep counting while you move between chats, tabs, and mini apps. It can ring from the background when a session ends.
entries.value: तुम्ही चॅट्स, टॅब्स आणि मिनी ॲप्स दरम्यान स्विच करत असतानाही सुरू राहणारे फोकस आणि ब्रेक सेशन्स चालवा. सत्र संपल्यावर हे बॅकग्राउंडमधून वाजू शकते.

entries.source: Run or reason through the change yourself.
entries.value: change स्वतः run करा किंवा reason through करा.

entries.source: Run spaced retrieval sessions and build review schedules.
entries.value: spaced retrieval sessions run करा आणि review schedules build करा.

entries.source: safe AI learning tool for students
entries.value: students साठी safe AI learning tool

entries.source: Save the corrected mistake as a checklist or flashcard.
entries.value: corrected mistake checklist किंवा flashcard म्हणून save करा.

entries.source: Save the final mistake or insight as review material.
entries.value: final mistake किंवा insight review material म्हणून save करा.

entries.source: Saved user conversations use private identifiers, are not included in the sitemap or AI discovery files, and should not be treated as public source material.
entries.value: Saved user conversations private identifiers वापरतात, sitemap किंवा AI discovery files मध्ये included नाहीत आणि public source material म्हणून treat करू नयेत.

entries.source: Say the goal in ordinary language.
Say what you think is happening, and your buddy diagnoses hidden misconceptions with gentle tests.
entries.value: तुम्हाला काय वाटते ते सांगा, आणि तुमचा सोबती सौम्य चाचण्यांद्वारे लपलेले गैरसमज शोधून काढेल.

entries.source: Schedule quizzes and recall before rereading so the plan reveals weak spots.
entries.value: plan weak spots reveal करावा म्हणून rereading आधी quizzes आणि recall schedule करा.

entries.source: Schedule the next repetition while the miss is still fresh.
entries.value: miss अजून fresh असताना next repetition schedule करा.

entries.source: School and CSR pathways for funded access
entries.value: funded access साठी School आणि CSR pathways

entries.source: School deployments can be adapted around custom content, workflows, prompts, and NCERT-aligned learning needs where appropriate.
entries.value: योग्य ठिकाणी school deployments custom content, workflows, prompts आणि NCERT-aligned learning needs भोवती adapt करता येतात.

entries.source: School rollouts can be planned around student privacy, staff oversight, and the practical boundaries a learning community needs.
entries.value: School rollouts student privacy, staff oversight आणि learning community ला लागणाऱ्या practical boundaries भोवती plan करता येतात.

entries.source: Schools and partners can build from the public product toward tailored, confidential, and subsidized deployments.
entries.value: Schools आणि partners public product पासून tailored, confidential आणि subsidized deployments कडे build करू शकतात.

entries.source: Schools can evaluate inspir through public guest modes first, then explore tailored AI learning spaces with custom workflows, confidentiality planning, curriculum needs, and funded access paths.
entries.value: Schools आधी public guest modes द्वारे inspir evaluate करू शकतात, मग custom workflows, confidentiality planning, curriculum needs आणि funded access paths असलेल्या tailored AI learning spaces explore करू शकतात.

entries.source: Schools can evaluate public modes first, then discuss tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, content needs, and funded access.
entries.value: Schools आधी public modes evaluate करू शकतात, मग tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, content needs आणि funded access discuss करू शकतात.

entries.source: Schools can offer white-labelled AI chat experiences tailored to their learners, including NCERT-aligned content and workflows, with usage funded by partner schools or CSR sponsorship.
entries.value: शाळा त्यांच्या learners साठी tailored white-labelled AI chat experiences देऊ शकतात, NCERT-aligned content आणि workflows सह, ज्याचा usage partner schools किंवा CSR sponsorship द्वारे funded असू शकतो.

entries.source: Schools can start by trying the public modes, then move toward a tailored version when they need custom workflows, content alignment, or funded access.
entries.value: Schools public modes try करून सुरू करू शकतात, मग custom workflows, content alignment किंवा funded access लागल्यावर tailored version कडे move करू शकतात.

entries.source: Schools can test public guest modes first, then use the schools page to explore tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, NCERT-aligned options, and funded access.
entries.value: Schools आधी public guest modes test करू शकतात, मग tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, NCERT-aligned options आणि funded access explore करण्यासाठी schools page वापरू शकतात.

entries.source: Science Lab Partner AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Plan safe demonstrations, understand variables, predict outcomes, and reason from evidence like a scientist.
entries.value: Science Lab Partner AI Learning Mode हा passive answer collection ऐवजी learning साठी AI वापरण्याचा focused मार्ग आहे. हा mode एका specific job भोवती तयार आहे: safe demonstrations plan करा, variables समजा, outcomes predict करा आणि scientist सारखे evidence वरून reason करा.

entries.source: Science Lab Partner AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: science Lab Partner AI शिकण्याचा mode: practical मार्गदर्शक

entries.source: Science Lab Partner prompts and study loop
entries.value: Science Lab Partner prompts आणि study loop

entries.source: Search engines see pages. Learners need sequences. These paths connect the public modes into practical study loops for understanding, homework, exam prep, and exploration.
entries.value: Search engines pages पाहतात. Learners ना sequences लागतात. हे paths understanding, homework, exam prep आणि exploration साठी public modes ना practical study loops मध्ये जोडतात.

entries.source: Search pages, AI answer engines, and learners all get the same promise: public, useful, canonical entrypoints that open directly inside the learning experience.
entries.value: Search pages, AI answer engines आणि learners सर्वांना एकच promise मिळते: public, useful, canonical entrypoints जे थेट learning experience मध्ये उघडतात.
